title: React Chat Widget Help
description: This widget provides a simple real-time chat interface inside 3DEXPERIENCE.

sections.heading: Getting Started
items: Open the widget from your dashboard.
Enter a message in the input box.
Press Enter or click Send to post your message.

sections.heading: Preferences
items: Username: display name used in chat messages.
Theme: select Light or Dark mode.
Max Messages: number of messages kept in the list.
